examples: It is time to go beyond the shibboleth that conventional forces cannot deter.
His article is stuffed with shibboleth.
Notice that in each case the objection is based on a shibboleth.
This was a sign that Umberto Agnelli and his small, well-regarded staff will abandon at least one shibboleth.
One application, called Shibboleth, is a piece of open source software that enables users to share restricted online resources.
